meta.title: After the Election: Can the New Congress Repeal Health Care
meta.description: Many victorious candidates in the newly elected Republican-controlled House campaigned on repealing health care reform. But with the Senate remaining under Democratic control, what will become of efforts to“repeal and replace” President Obama’s Affordable Care Act? - Captured Live on Ustream at http://www.ustream.tv/channel/hudson-institute
